attacks.name: Plasma
attacks.effect: If there are any Lightning Energy cards in your discard pile, flip a coin. If heads, attach 1 of them to Zapdos.

attacks.name: Lightning Storm
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, put 2 damage counters on Zapdos.

attacks.name: Poison Scent
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned and Confused. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep.

attacks.name: Addictive Pollen
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent can't play Supporter cards during his or her next turn.

attacks.name: Corrosive Acid
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Shadow Bind
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Destructive Roar
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard 1 Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Gigacrush
attacks.effect: Each player discards the top 3 cards from his or her deck.

attacks.name: Mini-Metronome
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Mini-Metronome copies that attack except for its Energy cost. (You must still do anything else required in order to use that attack.) (No matter what type the Defending Pokémon is, Togetic is still Colorless.) Togetic performs that attack.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Hypno Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage. If tails, this attack does 30 damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Copy
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Copy copies that attack. This attack does nothing if Sudowoodo doesn't have the Energy necessary to use that attack. (You must still do anything else required in order to use that attack.)

attacks.name: Energy Draw
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to Sudowoodo. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Earth Rift
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Then, flip a coin. If tails, this attack can't be used during your next turn.

attacks.name: Iron Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both are heads, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage. If both are tails, this attack does nothing. If 1 is heads and 1 is tails, this attack just does 50 damage.

attacks.name: Bursting Hand
attacks.effect: Look at your opponent's hand. This attack does 10 damage times the number of Energy cards there.

attacks.name: Shuffle Attack
attacks.effect: Look at a number of cards on top of your opponent's deck equal to the number of Energy cards attached to the Defending Pokémon. Put those cards in any order, and then put them back on top of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Snatch
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with no damage counters on it and switch the Defending Pokémon with it.

attacks.name: Heavy Metal
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the amount of Metal Energy attached to Scizor. This attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Smokescreen
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Miracle Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a Special Condition (Asleep, Burned, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned). The Defending Pokémon is now affected by that Special Condition.

attacks.name: Roasting Heat
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is Burned, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Giant Horn
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 damage plus 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Burning Sludge
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the amount of Grass Energy attached to Muk. If any of them are heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned and Burned.

attacks.name: Steel Wave
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that are the same type (color) as the Defending Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Electric Tackle
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage plus 10 damage for each Lightning Energy attached to Lanturn. Flip a coin. If tails, Lanturn does 10 damage to itself for each Lightning Energy attached to it.

attacks.name: Rapids
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard 1 Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon, if any.

attacks.name: Cotton Punch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Spiral Aura
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon isn't Knocked Out by the damage from this attack, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch the Defending Pokémon with it.

attacks.name: Fireworks
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Houndoom.

attacks.name: Dark Impact
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't use any Poké-Powers until the end of your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Super Eggsplosion
attacks.effect: Discard any number of Energy cards attached to any of your Pokémon. Flip a number of coins equal to the number of Energy cards discarded this way. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Called Shot
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage times the amount of Grass Energy attached to Exeggutor. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Poison Horn
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Rolling Thunder
attacks.effect: Flip a coin, If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If tails, this attack does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage times the number of Energy cards attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Steam Blast
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to Lugia.

attacks.name: Aquabomb
attacks.effect: Kingdra does 10 damage to itself. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance when Kingdra damages itself with this attack.)

attacks.name: Dual Burn
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. For each tails, discard 1 Energy card attached to Kingdra.

rules: Warp Energy provides 1 Colorless Energy. When you attach Warp Energy from your hand to your Active Pokémon, switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Crystal Energy provides 1 Energy of all types (colors) of basic Energy cards attached to the Pokémon Crystal Energy is attached to. If there are no basic Energy cards attached to the Pokémon Crystal Energy is attached to, Crystal Energy provides Colorless Energy.

Boost Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon. Discard Boost Energy at the end of the turn it was attached. Boost Energy provides ColorlessColorlessColorless Energy. The Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to can't retreat. When the Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to is no longer an Evolved Pokémon, discard Boost Energy.

Attach Rainbow Energy to 1 of your Pokémon. While in play, Rainbow Energy provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card when not in play.) When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, put 1 damage counter on that Pokémon.

Damage done to the Pokémon Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). If the Pokémon Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal, whenever it damages a Pokémon, reduce that damage by 10 (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Metal Energy provides Metal Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

If the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to damages the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance), the attack does 10 more damage to the Defending Pokémon. At the end of every turn, put 1 damage counter on the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to, unless it's Darkness or has Dark in its name. Darkness Energy provides Darkness Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

Attach this card to 1 of your Pokémon. Discard it at the end of your opponent's next turn.

As long as this card is attached, this Pokémon has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Splatter
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness or Resistance.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Water Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Water Cube 01.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Once during each of his or her turns, a player may discard a basic Energy card from his or her hand. If that player does, he or she chooses a basic Energy card from his or her discard pile, shows it to his or her opponent, and then puts it into his or her hand.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Once during each player's turn (before attacking), that player may flip a coin. If heads, that player chooses 1 of his or her Evolved Pokémon in play and discards the top Evolution card from that Pokémon, devolving it.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Search your deck for up to 2 Technical Machine and/or Pokémon Tool cards, show them to your opponent, and then put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Take 5 Baby Pokémon, Basic Pokémon, Evolution, and/or basic Energy cards from your discard pile and then show them to your opponent. Shuffle them into your deck.

Attach Time Shard to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool card attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

If the Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from the Defending Pokémon's attack during your opponent's turn, you may return up to 2 basic Energy cards attached to that Pokémon to your hand.

Flip 2 coins. If both are heads, discard all Energy cards attached to the Defending Pokémon. If both are tails, discard all Energy cards attached to your Active Pokémon. If 1 is heads and 1 is tails, this card does nothing.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Look at the top 6 cards of your deck. Take all Basic Energy cards you find there, show them to your opponent, and then put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Psy Confuse
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Psychic Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may us this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Psychic Cube 01.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Once during each of his or her turns, whenever a player attaches an Energy card from his or her hand to 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon, he or she removes 1 damage counter, if any, from that Pokémon.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Search your deck for up to 2 Baby Pokémon and/or Basic Pokémon cards and put them onto your bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Metal Reversal
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with the Defending Pokémon.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Metal Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Metal Cube 01.

Attach Memory Berry to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

The Pokémon this card is attached to can use any attack from its Basic Pokémon card or any Evolution card from which the Pokémon evolved. (You still have to pay for that attack's Energy cost.) Discard this card at the end of any turn the Pokémon attacks.

attacks.name: Discharge
attacks.effect: Discard all Lightning Energy cards attached to this Pokémon. Then, flip a number of coins equal to the number of Energy cards discarded that way. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Lightning Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Lightning Cube 01.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Discard up to 2 basic Energy cards from your hand. If you discarded 1 basic Energy card, draw 3 cards. If you discarded 2 basic Energy cards, draw 5 cards.

Attach Healing Berry to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool card attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

At the end of any turn, if the Pokémon this card is attached to has 20 HP or less, remove 3 damage counters from that Pokémon and discard this card.

attacks.name: Sleep Poison
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Grass Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Grass Cube 01.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Shuffle your deck. Then, look at the top 7 cards of your deck. Choose 1 of those cards and put it into your hand. Shuffle the rest into your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Fire Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Fire Cube 01.

attacks.name: Violent Rage
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the number of damage counters on this Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Fighting Pokémon in play. That Pokémon my use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Fighting Cube 01.
Move a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard any Trainer cards attached to the Defending Pokémon.

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Darkness Pokémon in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. At the end of your turn, discard Darkness Cube 01.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

Once during each player's turn (before attacking), if that player's Bench isn't full, that player flips a coin. If heads, that player shows his or her opponent a basic Energy card from his or her hand. Then, that player searches his or her deck for a Basic Pokémon card of the same type (color) as the revealed Energy card and puts it onto his or her Bench. The player shuffles his or her deck afterward.

attacks.effect: Each player discards the top 3 cards from his or her deck.

attacks.name: Mini-Metronome
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Mini-Metronome copies that attack except for its Energy cost. (You must still do anything else required in order to use that attack.) (No matter what type the Defending Pokémon is, Togetic is still Colorless.) Togetic performs that attack.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Hypno Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage. If tails, this attack does 30 damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Copy
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Copy copies that attack. This attack does nothing if Sudowoodo doesn't have the Energy necessary to use that attack. (You must still do anything else required in order to use that attack.)

attacks.name: Energy Draw
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to Sudowoodo. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Earth Rift
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Then, flip a coin. If tails, this attack can't be used during your next turn.

attacks.name: Iron Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both are heads, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage. If both are tails, this attack does nothing. If 1 is heads and 1 is tails, this attack just does 50 damage.

attacks.name: Bursting Hand
attacks.effect: Look at your opponent's hand. This attack does 10 damage times the number of Energy cards there.

attacks.name: Shuffle Attack
attacks.effect: Look at a number of cards on top of your opponent's deck equal to the number of Energy cards attached to the Defending Pokémon. Put those cards in any order, and then put them back on top of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Energy Cannon
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage plus 10 damage for each Energy attached to Slowbro but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Snatch
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with no damage counters on it and switch the Defending Pokémon with it.

attacks.name: Heavy Metal
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the amount of Metal Energy attached to Scizor. This attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Rapidash.

attacks.name: Gallop
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Rapidash and this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Water Gun
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Quagsire but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Karate Chop
attacks.effect: Damage from this attack is reduced by 10 for each damage counter on Primeape.

attacks.name: Sudden Charge
attacks.effect: Primeape does 10 damage to itself. Then, your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon, if any.

attacks.name: Hypnotic Ray
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Sleep Inducer
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch the Defending Pokémon with it. The new Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Rapture Pollen
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep. If tails, remove 2 damage counters from Parasect.

attacks.name: Smokescreen
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Miracle Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a Special Condition (Asleep, Burned, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned). The Defending Pokémon is now affected by that Special Condition.

attacks.name: Roasting Heat
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is Burned, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Giant Horn
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 damage plus 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Burning Sludge
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the amount of Grass Energy attached to Muk. If any of them are heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned and Burned.

attacks.name: Steel Wave
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that are the same type (color) as the Defending Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Electric Tackle
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage plus 10 damage for each Lightning Energy attached to Lanturn. Flip a coin. If tails, Lanturn does 10 damage to itself for each Lightning Energy attached to it.

attacks.name: Conduction
attacks.effect: Discard all Lightning Energy cards attached to Lanturn. Flip a number of coins equal to the number of Lightning Energy cards you discarded. This attack does 30 damage plus 40 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Rapids
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard 1 Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon, if any.

attacks.name: Meditate
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Cotton Punch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Spiral Aura
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon isn't Knocked Out by the damage from this attack, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch the Defending Pokémon with it.

attacks.name: Fireworks
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Houndoom.

attacks.name: Dark Impact
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't use any Poké-Powers until the end of your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Smokescreen
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Burn Up
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard all Fire Energy cards attached to Houndoom.

attacks.name: Big Eggsplosion
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the amount of Energy attached to Exeggutor. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Lateral Eggsplosion
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the amount of Energy attached to all of of your Benched Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Super Eggsplosion
attacks.effect: Discard any number of Energy cards attached to any of your Pokémon. Flip a number of coins equal to the number of Energy cards discarded this way. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Called Shot
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage times the amount of Grass Energy attached to Exeggutor. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Damage Blast
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the number of damage counters on the Defending Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Burning Fang
attacks.effect: You may flip a coin. If heads, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Entei and the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Energy Kick
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon. Your opponent moves that card to 1 of his or her other Pokémon. (If your opponent has no Benched Pokémon, this attack does nothing.)

rules: If your Active Pokémon is a Baby Pokémon and your opponent announces an attack, your opponent flips a coin (before doing anything else). If tails, your opponent's turn ends.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your own Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Double Stab
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Smash Bomber
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Knife Leaf
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Aqua Sonic
attacks.effect: Don't apply Resistance.

attacks.name: Spider Force
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage. If tails, this attack does 20 damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fire Blow
attacks.effect: You may discard any number of Fire Energy cards attached to Arcanine when you use this attack. If you do, flip a number of coins equal to the number of Fire Energy cards you discarded. This attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.effect: If you have any Benched Pokémon and if there are any basic Energy cards attached to Ampharos, take 1 of those Energy cards and attach it to 1 of those Pokémon.

attacks.name: Damage Blast
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the number of damage counters on the Defending Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Burning Fang
attacks.effect: You may flip a coin. If heads, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Entei and the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Smash Bomber
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Knife Leaf
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Aqua Sonic
attacks.effect: Don't apply Resistance.

attacks.name: Spider Force
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage. If tails, this attack does 20 damage and the defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fire Blow
attacks.effect: You may discard any number of Fire Energy cards attached to Arcanine when you use this attack. If you do, flip a number of coins equal to the number of Fire Energy cards you discarded. This attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.effect: If you have any Benched Pokémon and if there are any basic Energy cards attached to Ampharos, take 1 of those Energy cards and attach it to 1 of those Pokémon.
